query_string:
with week_list as (
  select distinct processing_date
  from hst_weekly_customer_rf
  where time >= td_time_parse('2023-10-01', 'jst')
)

, weekly_customer_status as (
  select distinct
      processing_date
    , customer_id
    , r_week
    , f
    , nomination_last_order
    , shop_no_last_order
    , shop_name as shop_name_last_order
  from hst_weekly_customer_rf as t0
  left join mst_shop as t1
    on cast(t0.shop_no_last_order as varchar) = t1.shop_no
  where t0.time between td_time_parse('2023-10-01', 'jst')
                    and td_date_trunc('week', td_scheduled_time(), 'jst')
)

, weekly_order as (
  select distinct
      td_time_string(td_date_trunc('week', time, 'jst'), 'd!', 'jst') as processing_date
    , customer_id
  from cls_order_detail
  where time >= td_time_parse('2023-10-01', 'jst')
    and order_id_hour_seq = 1
)

, agg as (
  select
      coalesce(t0.processing_date, t1.processing_date) as processing_date
    , coalesce(t0.customer_id, t1.customer_id) as customer_id
    , case
        when r_week is null and coalesce(t0.customer_id, t1.customer_id) is null then '01_新規(非会員)'
        when r_week is null and coalesce(t0.customer_id, t1.customer_id) is not null then '02_新規(会員)'
        when r_week between 1 and 4 then '03_R/w1-4'
        when r_week between 5 and 8 then '04_R/w5-8'
        when r_week between 9 and 12 then '05_R/w9-12'
        when r_week between 13 and 24 then '06_R/w13-24'
        when r_week between 25 and 52 then '07_R/w25-52'
        when r_week >= 53 then '08_R/w53-'
        else '不明'
      end as r_week
    , f
  from weekly_customer_status as t0
  full join weekly_order as t1
    on t0.processing_date = t1.processing_date
   and t0.customer_id = t1.customer_id
)

, prev_week as (
  select
    processing_date
    , customer_id
    , r_week
    , f
    , lag(r_week) over (partition by customer_id order by processing_date) as r_week_prev
    , lag(processing_date) over (partition by customer_id order by processing_date) as processing_date_prev
    , date_diff(
        'day',
        cast(lag(processing_date) over (partition by customer_id order by processing_date) as date),
        cast(processing_date as date)
      ) as gap_days_from_prev
  from agg
)

, rw1_4_window as (
  select
    processing_date
    , customer_id
    , r_week
    , f
    , processing_date_prev
    , case
        when r_week = '03_R/w1-4'
         and (coalesce(r_week_prev, '不明') <> '03_R/w1-4'
              or coalesce(gap_days_from_prev, 999999) > 7)
        then 1 else 0
      end as start_flag_03
    , sum(
        case
          when r_week = '03_R/w1-4'
           and (coalesce(r_week_prev, '不明') <> '03_R/w1-4'
                or coalesce(gap_days_from_prev, 999999) > 7)
          then 1 else 0
        end
      ) over (partition by customer_id order by processing_date
              rows between unbounded preceding and current row) as block_id_raw
  from prev_week
)

, rw1_4_entered_week as (
  select
    customer_id
    , block_id_raw
    , min(processing_date) as entered_week
    , min(processing_date_prev) as prev_week
  from rw1_4_window
  where r_week = '03_R/w1-4'
    and block_id_raw is not null
  group by customer_id, block_id_raw
)

, pre_rw_status as (
  select
    t0.customer_id
    , entered_week
    , prev_week
    , t1.r_week as prev_r_week
    , t1.f as prev_f
  from rw1_4_entered_week as t0
  left join agg as t1
    on t0.customer_id = t1.customer_id
       and t0.prev_week = t1.processing_date
)

, timeline as (
  select
    customer_id
    , entered_week
    , prev_week
    , prev_r_week
    , prev_f
    , row_number() over (partition by customer_id order by entered_week) as boundary_rank
  from pre_rw_status
)

select
  customer_id as "会員ID"
  , boundary_rank as "N回目のR/w1-4"
  , entered_week as "R/w1-4になった週"
  , prev_week as "R/w1-4になった前週"
  , prev_r_week as "R/w1-4になる前のR/w"
  , prev_f + 1 as "R/w1-4になった時点のF"
from timeline
where substr(entered_week, 1, 4) = '2025'
order by customer_id, boundary_rank
limit 3000
